examples.title: SVM Training with Kernel
examples.code:
FUNCTION train_kernel_svm(X, y, kernel):
    Compute kernel matrix K
    Solve dual optimization problem:
        max Σα_i - 0.5 ΣΣα_iα_j y_i y_j K(x_i,x_j)
        s.t. 0 ≤ α_i ≤ C
             Σα_i y_i = 0
    Return support vectors and α values
examples.explanation: Shows key steps in kernelized SVM training without explicit feature mapping
examples.timeComplexity: O(n²) to O(n³) depending on solver
